summary: Iteration 32: Volunteer Leaderboard Gamification Feature - ALL 17 TESTS PASSED. Verified 3 new endpoints: GET /portal/volunteer/leaderboard, GET /portal/volunteer/my-stats, POST /admin/volunteer/log-hours. Badge tiers correctly computed, leaderboard sorted by signup_count desc, role-based access working.

endpoints: GET /api/portal/volunteer/leaderboard - returns ranked volunteers with badges, hours, ministry areas
verified: Returns 6 volunteers ranked by signup_count descending
Each entry has: rank, user_id, user_name, signup_count, total_hours, ministry_areas, badge

endpoints: GET /api/portal/volunteer/my-stats - current user's stats, badge, rank, progress %
verified: Maria Garcia: 14 signups, rank=4, badge=Helping Hand

endpoints: POST /api/admin/volunteer/log-hours - admin logs hours for a user
verified: Admin successfully logged 3.5h for Maria Garcia
Entry includes: user_id, user_name, hours, date, logged_by, status='logged'

tests: All 3 endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests

critical_code_review_comments: Badge tier computation (compute_volunteer_badge) correctly calculates progress % relative to current and next tier
Leaderboard aggregation pipeline uses $addToSet for ministry_areas deduplication
Admin log-hours creates new volunteer_signups entry with 'logged' status
Role validation: get_current_member_user allows member/admin/platform_admin; get_current_admin_user requires admin only

seed_data_status.details: Leaderboard shows 6 volunteers: Michael Brown (35), Sarah Johnson (22), James Williams (17), Maria Garcia (14), Emily Davis (12), Rachel Martinez (9)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Volunteer Leaderboard gamification feature fully functional. 3 endpoints tested: (1) /portal/volunteer/leaderboard returns ranked list with badges, (2) /portal/volunteer/my-stats returns personal stats with progress % to next badge, (3) /admin/volunteer/log-hours allows admin to manually log hours. Badge tiers: Helping Hand (5+), Faithful Servant (15+), Ministry Champion (30+), Church Pillar (50+), Kingdom Builder (100+). Progress calculation is relative between current tier floor and next tier threshold.

mocked_apis.note: All endpoints use real MongoDB - no mocked APIs
